message: Auto-transform on paste in Bulk Trades panel, bump to v1.0.5
author: Ganesh

message: feat: migrate storage from localStorage to IndexedDB (v1.1.0)
body:
- Add js/db.js — IndexedDB core layer with open/schema, CRUD helpers,
  and settings helpers (dbGetAll, dbGet, dbPut, dbDelete, dbReplaceAll,
  dbGetSetting, dbPutSetting, dbDeleteSetting)
- Add js/migration.js — one-time migration that reads all localStorage
  keys and writes them into the appropriate IndexedDB stores; guarded
  by a _migrated_v1 flag so it only runs once
- Rewrite storage.js, wotp-storage.js, llm-trade-plan.js — in-memory
  cache + async write-through; public API stays synchronous
- Update plan.js — plans stored as individual IDB records, plan-last-view
  persisted via settings store, deleteDayPlan uses dbDelete
- Update news.js — config, taxonomy, LLM queries/results/categories and
  per-symbol prevRpt snapshots all stored in IndexedDB
- Update calendar.js — module-level localStorage read moved to async
  _initCalendarMonth(); save/remove use dbPutSetting/dbDeleteSetting
- Update app.js — restore merges plans via dbReplaceAll; bottom init
  wrapped in async IIFE: openDB → migrate → load all stores → render
- Update README — Data & Privacy section updated with IDB schema table,
  project structure updated with new files, version bumped to v1.1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
author: Ganesh
